title: Fufu With Light Soup
creator: Kwame Safo
summary: t is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content.
instructions: Fufu (The Swallow)Ingredients: Boiled and pounded cassava mixed with unripe plantain or cocoyam.Texture: A smooth, stretchy, dough-like paste, molded into balls to be swallowed without chewing.Taste: Mild and neutral, designed to absorb the flavor of the soup.Light Soup (Nkrakra)Description: A thin, watery, and fiery hot tomato-based broth (not a thick gravy).Ingredients: Fresh tomatoes, onions, hot peppers (Scotch bonnet), ginger, garlic, and traditionally, goat meat, chicken, or fresh fish.Flavor Profile: Intense, spicy, and tangy, often with a hint of smoky flavor from garden eggs or local spices
